Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x8062 "CADCAMWARRIOR-C000-8062" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$3f sta $01 jsr $c000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Cad-Cam Warrior.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $C000 which: 1. Sets the correct VICII settings 2. Sets the correct border and screen colours as well as background #1 and #2 colours 3. Initialises colour RAM for the loading screen to display correctly 4. Displays the loading screen and waits for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game
